{{Infobox artifact
| name = Worldslayer
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

''See also: [[Worldslayer Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Worldslayer is a highly advanced [[Aethertech weapon]], comparable in power to an enchanted device of world-level magnitude. Primarily used as a handheld gun by the combatant known as [[Sola]], the weapon manifests as a collection of crimson razors or a deadly light that appears to cut through existence itself. When discharged, it projects sharp beams of red energy capable of piercing through shields, space, and massive entities such as the [[Zenith]] Starship or the D'Niss. The weapon has been used to wound powerful beings like [[Starhammer]] and the [[Iron King]], though it requires time to recharge. Using the device carries significant risks, as its deployment can cause global catastrophes or threaten the safety of the user and their surroundings. Beyond handheld versions, copies of the weapon have been utilized by ships like the Last [[Horizon]].}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Worldslayer is an [[Aethertech weapon]] held within [[Sola]]'s inventory. This gun shines in the [[Aether]] like a deadly star and possesses the capability to project a bridge to annihilate space. Throughout her journey, [[Sola]] considers summoning the weapon and reaches for it during critical moments. After retrieving the item, she eventually puts it away.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Sola]] possesses the [[Worldslayer]] in her inventory.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28">''The Captain'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Worldslayer]] is an item [[Sola]] considers summoning.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c29">''The Captain'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Worldslayer]] is an [[Aethertech weapon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Worldslayer]] is a gun that shines in the [[Aether]] like a deadly star.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c42">''The Captain'', chapter 42</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Worldslayer]] is a weapon that can project a bridge to annihilate space.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c42" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Sola]] retrieves the [[Worldslayer]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c44">''The Captain'', chapter 44</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Worldslayer]] is a weapon that [[Sola]] reached for.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45">''The Captain'', chapter 45</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Worldslayer]] is an item that [[Sola]] put away.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c48">''The Captain'', chapter 48</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Worldslayer]] left a scarlet-edged wound in [[Starhammer]]'s chest.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c52">''The Engineer'', chapter 52</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Using [[Worldslayer]] risks the destruction of the user and others on the colony.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c54">''The Engineer'', chapter 54</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Worldslayer]] is a masterwork [[Aethertech]] on par with a world-level enchanted device.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c16">''The Knight'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Worldslayer]] fires a knife-sharp beam.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Worldslayer]] was used by [[Sola]] to shoot [[Sel’miroth]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17">''The Knight'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Worldslayer]] is a gun consisting of a collection of crimson razors.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c43">''The Knight'', chapter 43</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Worldslayer]] is a replicated version of [[Sola]]'s greatest weapon created by [[Horizon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48">''The Pilot'', chapter 48</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A direct strike from [[Worldslayer]] weakened the enemy and caused a global disaster for [[Zykaros]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Sola shot Sel’miroth with Worldslayer.”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
